close_reason: Debug impl now shows credential source count via debug_struct
description:
src/lib.rs:201-205 implements Debug for ChainedCredential by writing the type name only. The reason cannot be derive(Debug) directly because Arc<dyn TokenCredential> does not implement Debug.

Idiomatic alternatives:
1. f.debug_struct("ChainedCredential").field("sources", &self.sources.len()).finish() — communicates more than just the type name; helps in panic backtraces.
2. Wrap the Vec in a Debug-printing newtype that prints '[<count> sources]'.

Why it matters: Debug output that says only 'ChainedCredential' is indistinguishable from any other ZST in a panic message. Adding the source count makes the impl carry information, which is the entire point of Debug.
title: Manual Debug impl for ChainedCredential could derive or include source count
